identity: Human female rogue, young, shoulder-length straight auburn hair falling out of a large black hood, brown eyes, steady unreadable face.
outfit: Large black cloth hood framing the face, black leather body armor with layered segments across the torso, black gauntlets, a brown leather belt with buckles across the chest.
weapons: Twin steel daggers in crossed back scabbards; pommels and hilts visible over each shoulder, worn leather grips.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-strike, right-hand dagger stab forward at waist height, left-hand dagger held back in reverse grip, knees bent, hood up.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both daggers drawn and held low and outward in a shadow-step stance, faint dark purple wisps around the blades.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both daggers crossed in front of the face in an X guard, hood up, knees bent.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, both daggers dropped in front of her, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), silent hooded idle. Daggers still sheathed on the back, arms at sides.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Large black hood framing the face, auburn hair falling forward, black leather armor with leather belt across the chest, dagger pommels visible over each shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female rogue, young, shoulder-length straight auburn hair falling out of a large black hood, brown eyes, steady unreadable face.

OUTFIT: Large black cloth hood framing the face, black leather body armor with layered segments across the torso, black gauntlets, a brown leather belt with buckles across the chest.

WEAPONS: Twin steel daggers in crossed back scabbards; pommels and hilts visible over each shoulder, worn leather grips.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female rogue, young, shoulder-length straight auburn hair falling out of a large black hood, brown eyes, steady unreadable face.

OUTFIT: Large black cloth hood framing the face, black leather body armor with layered segments across the torso, black gauntlets, a brown leather belt with buckles across the chest.

WEAPONS: Twin steel daggers in crossed back scabbards; pommels and hilts visible over each shoulder, worn leather grips.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Large black hood framing the face, auburn hair falling forward, black leather armor with leather belt across the chest, dagger pommels visible over each shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
